title: HighTide's Skyblock Profile Viewer
description: A mod for Minecraft that adds commands and GUIs that will display a players Hypixel SkyBlock stats.
body:
# HighTide's Hypixel Profile Viewer
## What is it?
**HighTide's Hypixel Profile Viewer** is a modification for Minecraft Java Edition that adds many commands and GUIs to the game that are fully disigned for viewing SkyBlock profile data. Some of the commands or menus can be used to (for example), see a players balance or how much coins they have in total.

## How does it work?
**HighTide's Hypixel Profile Viewer** works by making use of [SkyCrypt's API](https://sky.shiiyu.moe/api) to fetch a players data from the _Hypixel API_. This being said, there is a timeout if you use the SkyCrypt api too much, this being if you use it more than (I believe but I could be wrong).

## Is it bannable?
**No**, this mod will not get you banned off Hypixel as it is completely in compliance with [Hypixel's TOS](https://hypixel.net/terms). If you do get banned whilst using this mod, it is for another reason not related to the mod.
